channel.title: Wealth-Management on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation
channel.description: Recent content in Wealth-Management on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation

item.title: The Cost of Closed Doors: Why All Investors Deserve Global Access
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: A reflection on the Philippine SEC’s decision to ban Interactive Brokers and the broader implications for financial inclusion, wealth democratization, and the urgent need for modernized regulatory frameworks in the digital age.

item.title: Manulife Asset Management & Trust
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: The first trust entity in the Philippines owned by an insurance company, offering direct access to global asset classes through innovative feeder funds.
